prompt: Find the candidate record “Lucas Romero” at Museum Education and report its stable ID, current date, location, and status. Do not make any changes yet. Write every date as YYYY-MM-DD and do not add details the tools did not return.

follow_up_turns.content: Move that same candidate record to Visitor Services and set its date to 2026-10-25. Keep its status unchanged and notify no one.
The new location is right, but correct the date to 2026-11-11. Keep it at Visitor Services; do not revert any other field.

stages.purpose: Resolve the target record before any mutation.
Apply the requested date and location together to the resolved record.
Correct only the date while retaining the location set by the preceding update.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
Write every date as YYYY-MM-DD and do not add details the tools did not return.
The final date-only update must retain the location established by the preceding turn.
